# TRUST(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  trust — query trust matrix

## SYNOPSIS
  trust [OPTIONS] [ARGS]

## DESCRIPTION
View trust, respect, and fear scores for an agent.

## OPTIONS
  <agent_id>  query specific agent

## EXAMPLES
  trust raven
  trust ada

## ENVIRONMENT
  Terminal Depths v1.0 — cyberpunk hacking simulation
